title: Event
description: A discrete state change in the lifecycle of a vehicle or mobility asset, such as a trip starting, vehicle reserved, or battery low.

eventType.description: Type of lifecycle event (e.g. TRIP_START, VEHICLE_RESERVED, BATTERY_LOW)

entityId.description: Identifier of the entity that generated the event

triggeredAt.description: Timestamp when the event was triggered

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the state was last updated
